news.summary:
# Summary

Cologne city has announced new regulations for public viewing of World Cup matches in 2026, which will affect bars and restaurants showing the games. The rules establish clear guidelines for how establishments can host fans watching football matches during the tournament. Visitors to Cologne should be aware of these regulations as they'll determine where and how they can watch WM matches in bars and public venues throughout the city.

news.title: Henrique Sá Pessoa: “17 anos com restaurante em Lisboa e dez de Michelin dão alguma segurança para arriscar” - Diário de Notícias
news.summary:
# Summary

Chef Henrique Sá Pessoa, who has run a restaurant in Lisbon for 17 years and maintained a Michelin star for a decade, is taking creative risks in his cuisine. This news matters to food visitors because it highlights one of Lisbon's most established fine dining destinations where an experienced, award-winning chef continues to innovate. If you're looking for high-quality Portuguese gastronomy with proven credentials, this is a notable restaurant to consider.

news.title: A menos de 1 hora de Lisboa podes comer bacalhau lascado com broa no meio de vinhas - versa - lifestyle
news.summary:
# Summary

This article highlights a restaurant located within an hour of Lisbon where you can enjoy traditional Portuguese flaked cod (bacalhau lascado) with cornbread (broa) while dining among vineyards. Visitors to Lisbon looking for authentic Portuguese cuisine and a scenic countryside experience should consider this spot, as it offers both excellent local food and a picturesque vineyard setting just a short trip from the city.
